chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D – 3789 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Disposed of matter: For hearing of CMA No.17838/2023 (U/S 151 CPC) 01.09.2025 Sardar Muhammad Ishaq, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Rashid Arfi, Advocate for Respondent. Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Asstt. Attorney General -------------------------------------- Instant petition was disposed of vide order dated 13.09.2022. Pursuant to the order dated 21.06.2021, the Petitioner deposited the disputed amount before the Nazir of this Court. Subsequently, it is submitted by the learned counsel for the petitioner that Customs Appellate Tribunal decided the appeal in favour of the petitioner vide decision dated 29.11.2022. Thereafter, the concerned Collectorate issued NOC to the Nazir of this Court indicating therein that the dispute has been resolved. Contention of the counsel appears to be correct. Learned counsel appearing on behalf of the respondent No.4 has filed statement to this effect and accorded his no objection to the grant of listed application. Accordingly, the application is allowed as prayed. Nazir is directed to release the amount deposited pursuant to order dated 21.06.2021 along with any profit accumulated thereon, subject to deposit of certificate(s) by the petitioner. JUDGE JUDGE Nadeem
